heading: Jackadgery vs Jacksons Flat — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Jackadgery, New South Wales and Jacksons Flat, New South Wales. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Jackadgery and Jacksons Flat have similar overall climate risk scores.

faq.question: Is Jackadgery or Jacksons Flat safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Jackadgery has a flood risk score of 49/100, while Jacksons Flat scores 40/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Jackadgery scores 17/100 for bushfire risk. Jacksons Flat scores 29/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Jackadgery or Jacksons Flat?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Jackadgery has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.
